title: lyciodes obtusifolium
intro: Lyciodes obtusifolium, also known as the obtuse-leaved lyciodes, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Lyciodes obtusifolium include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction by steeping its leaves in hot water, and it may also be used in capsule or tincture form.
